repair_summary: Fixed _get_num_matches to count unique matched masses (from 'Mass' column) instead of unique input masses. Added fallback column detection and robust numeric conversion. Preserved default URL handling for missing LIPIDMAPS_URL.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a case with scientific notation m/z values.
Scaled executable cases must include a test case where LIPIDMAPS_URL is undefined.
Scaled executable cases must include a zero-match test case.
The verifier must check both return value and stdout.
